ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the species of the Pokémon */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* The generation in which the Pokémon was introduced */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the Pokémon is legendary */,
  "color" TEXT /* The primary color of the Pokémon */,
  "shape" TEXT /* The shape of the Pokémon */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* The habitat where the Pokémon is commonly found */,
  "gender_rate" TEXT /* The gender ratio of the Pokémon (e.g., 12.5% male) */,
  "egg_groups" TEXT /* The egg groups the Pokémon belongs to (e.g., 'monster', 'flying') */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* The growth rate of the Pokémon */,
  "egg_cycles" INTEGER /* The number of egg cycles required for the Pokémon to hatch */,
  "abilities" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of abilities the Pokémon can have */,
  "hidden_ability" TEXT /* A hidden ability the Pokémon can have */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* The name of the form if the Pokémon has multiple forms */,
  "form_order" INTEGER /* The order of the form if the Pokémon has multiple forms */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the default form of the Pokémon */,
  "introduced_in_version" TEXT /* The version of the game in which the Pokémon was introduced */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Hit points (HP) of the Pokémon */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "special_attack" INTEGER /* Special attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "special_defense" INTEGER /* Special defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed stat of the Pokémon */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience points awarded for defeating the Pokémon */,
  "base_happiness" INTEGER /* Base happiness value of the Pokémon */,
  "capture_rate" INTEGER /* Capture rate of the Pokémon */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the Pokémon in decimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the Pokémon in hectograms */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., grass, fire, water) */,
  "damage_relations" TEXT /* JSON object storing the damage relations of the type (e.g., double damage from, half damage from, no damage from) */,
  "generation_introduced" INTEGER /* The generation in which the type was introduced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_type_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type relation */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type */,
  "is_primary_type" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the type is the primary type of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type_relations_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type_relations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES pokemon_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media asset */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the media asset (e.g., image, sprite) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media asset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media asset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* The file type of the media asset (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* The format of the media asset (e.g., sprite, artwork) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the default media asset for the Pokémon */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the media asset */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the media asset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the media asset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_assets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_assets_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_assets_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, content creator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object storing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the Pokémon */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the Pokémon was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client making the access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* The time taken to process the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* The version number of the Pokémon data */,
  "is_major_version" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is a major version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_versions_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_version_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version detail */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute that changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the attribute */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the attribute */,
  "is_critical_change" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the change is critical */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* A brief description of why the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_version_details_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES pokemon_versions ("version_id")
)
